We aren't prophets
wave 1 is very easy this tide, as long as you stack enough DR to live for two turns, you can put any multihit awakener and kill the boss without trying
example
aurita can do it in 2 turns
just walk straight to the boss, tank the first 2 turns, wait for it to vuln itself, then kill it

burial is used mostly when you have a very dr stacking team, you lack a lot of crit rate on mouch if not super invested, could take pulse to help with than, and maybe my dearest friend, or analysis of death if the level has some mobs
this is more relevant to Arc2\astral, because at least in arc1 they trow crit rate at you with the relics
Burial is basically trash in arc 2 unless you run 3 of them or are using Faint
Amd running 3 is really situational obviously
